mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iot_outbound_delivery(tenant_id, org_id, event_id, event_type, subscription_id, channel_id, status, attempts, next_retry_at, last_error, http_status, payload_snapshot, is_delete, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{orgId}, #{eventId}, #{eventType}, #{subscriptionId}, #{channelId}, #{status}, #{attempts}, #{nextRetryAt}, #{lastError}, #{httpStatus}, #{payloadSnapshot}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE iot_outbound_delivery SET status = #{status}, attempts = #{attempts}, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, last_error = #{lastError}, http_status = #{httpStatus}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM iot_outbound_delivery WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM iot_outbound_delivery WHERE is_delete = 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM iot_outbound_delivery WHERE is_delete = 0

SELECT * FROM iot_outbound_delivery WHERE is_delete = 0 AND status = 'failed' AND attempts < #{maxAttempts} AND (next_retry_at IS NULL OR next_retry_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ORDER BY next_retry_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
